hero.title: N1B — Full-Cycle IT Solutions
hero.subtitle: Development and support of web and mobile applications, cloud infrastructure, and consulting. We deliver projects of any complexity.

experience.lead: For over {years} we have been helping businesses adopt and grow IT products.
experience.text: Reliability, transparent processes, and focus on results are what set N1B apart. We work with a modern stack and ensure quality at every stage.

faq.a: We cover the full IT cycle: web and mobile development, cloud, DevOps, support, and consulting. We'll find the right format for your needs.
We discuss the scope, agree on deliverables and timeline, assign a team. We work in iterations with regular feedback and demos.
Depends on scope: from a few weeks for an MVP to months for complex systems. We provide estimates after discussing requirements.
Based on effort, complexity, and timeline. We offer fixed price per phase or time-and-materials — whatever suits the client.
Web: Vue, React, Nuxt, Node. Mobile: React Native, Flutter. Backend and cloud: Node, Python, Go; AWS, GCP, Azure. We choose the stack per project.

footer.copy: © {year} N1B. All types of IT products.

web.title: Web development
web.shortDesc: Websites, web applications, and portals on modern frameworks.
web.detail: We build web applications of any complexity: from landing pages and corporate sites to SPAs and portals. We use Vue, React, Nuxt, and Next.js on the frontend, Node.js and Python on the backend. Responsive layout, accessibility, and performance are standard for every project.

mobile.title: Mobile applications
mobile.shortDesc: iOS and Android: native and cross-platform solutions.
mobile.detail: We create mobile apps for iOS and Android. We work with native development (Swift, Kotlin) and cross-platform tools (React Native, Flutter). From MVP to full-featured products with API integration, push notifications, and offline support.

cloud.title: Cloud solutions
cloud.shortDesc: Deployment, migration, and maintenance in the cloud.
cloud.detail: We help move and grow infrastructure in the cloud: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure. Server setup, containers (Docker, Kubernetes), databases, and monitoring. Migration of existing systems with minimal downtime and architecture consulting.

devops.title: DevOps and infrastructure
devops.detail: We set up continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD), containerization and orchestration. Deployment automation, monitoring and alerting, infrastructure as code (Terraform, Ansible). We reduce time to release and release risks.

support.title: Support and evolution
support.shortDesc: Technical support, enhancements, and scaling of existing systems.
support.detail: We take on technical support and evolution of your products: bug fixes, enhancements, dependency updates, and scaling. Flexible engagement: from one-off tasks to a dedicated team. We maintain continuity and documentation.

consulting.title: Consulting and audit
consulting.shortDesc: Code and architecture audit, optimization recommendations.
consulting.detail: We perform code, architecture, and development process audits. We provide recommendations on performance, security, and maintainability. We help choose stack and approaches for new projects and prepare specs for contractors.

sites.title: Website development
sites.shortDesc: We build modern websites that work for your business.

apps.title: App development
apps.shortDesc: We design digital products for growth and scale.

optimization.title: Optimization and automation
optimization.shortDesc: We help businesses run faster and more efficiently.

recruitment.title: IT recruitment
recruitment.shortDesc: We strengthen your team with strong developers.

serviceSubPage.cta: We'll discuss your needs and prepare a proposal. Get in touch.
